text: A bird sits on a rock in the water.
a boy with two bicycles reading a newspaper
The tennis player practices his form with his raquet.
The door to an empty refrigerator is open.
there is a man standing in the mountains next to a motorcycle
Two large motorcycles are inside a room with various memorabilia on the walls.
People ride an elephant down a busy road.
A boat sitting on top of a large body of water.
A foreign bus traveling down a street in front of jeep.
Closed umbrellas line the beach of a cove.
